Package org.eventb.core.ast

Class DefaultVisitor

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.DefaultVisitor
All Implemented Interfaces:
IVisitor, IVisitor2
Direct Known Subclasses:
ExtensionHelper.ExtensionGatherer, FormulaIndexer, IdentifierDecompositionTests.DecompositionChecker, SourceLocationChecker, VersionUpgraderV1V2.UpgradeVisitorV1V2
public class DefaultVisitor extends Object implements IVisitor2
Default visitor that does nothing, while traversing the whole AST.

This class is intended to be extended by clients, adding useful behavior.

Since:
1.0

      public DefaultVisitor()

  • Method Details

    • visitFREE_IDENT

      public boolean visitFREE_IDENT(FreeIdentifier ident)
      Description copied from interface: IVisitor
      Visits a FREE_IDENT node.
      Specified by:
      visitFREE_IDENT in interface IVisitor
      Parameters:
      ident - the node to visit
      Returns:
      false to prevent visiting the siblings of the given node, true to continue visiting.
      See Also:
      • Formula.accept(IVisitor)

    • enterSETEXT

      public boolean enterSETEXT(SetExtension set)
      Description copied from interface: IVisitor
      Enters a SETEXT node.
      Specified by:
      enterSETEXT in interface IVisitor
      Parameters:
      set - the node which is entered
      Returns:
      false to prevent visiting the children of the given node, true to continue visiting.
      See Also:
      • Formula.accept(IVisitor)

    • continueSETEXT

      public boolean continueSETEXT(SetExtension set)
      Description copied from interface: IVisitor
      Advances to the next child of a SETEXT node.
      Specified by:
      continueSETEXT in interface IVisitor
      Parameters:
      set - the parent node
      Returns:
      false to prevent visiting the remaining children of the given node, true to continue visiting.
      See Also:
      • Formula.accept(IVisitor)

    • exitSETEXT

      public boolean exitSETEXT(SetExtension set)
      Description copied from interface: IVisitor
      Exits a SETEXT node.
      Specified by:
      exitSETEXT in interface IVisitor
      Parameters:
      set - the node which is exited

      Parameters:
